introSection: Tambang Mas Coaster is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Suroboyo Carnival Night Market in Surabaya, East Java, Indonesia. It was previously located at Sofia Land in Bulgaria.
fullText: Tambang Mas Coaster is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Suroboyo Carnival Night Market in Surabaya, East Java, Indonesia. It was previously located at Sofia Land in Bulgaria.
